executor-api/package.json.summary: Package manifest describing a chatbot executor API with dependencies for Express, ESLint, CORS, and Nodemon, with scripts to start or run in development mode.

executor-api/server.js.summary: A Node.js/Express server that provides POST endpoints for syntax checking and linting JavaScript files with authentication via a token from environment variable RAILWAY_AUTH_TOKEN.

index.html.summary: HTML entry point for a 'Self-Recursive Bot' React application with mobile-responsive styles, import maps for React, ReactDOM, and Zustand libraries.

netlify.toml.summary: Netlify configuration defining build commands, deploy preview bypass, and edge function proxies for DeepSeek, OpenRouter, Firecrawl, LangSearch, executor, and GitHub token endpoints.

netlify/edge-functions/deepseek-proxy.js.summary: Edge function that proxies POST requests to DeepSeek's chat completions API, supporting streaming (SSE) and non-streaming responses with proper error handling.

netlify/edge-functions/executor-proxy.js.summary: Netlify Edge function that proxies POST requests to a Railway-hosted executor API, forwarding authentication tokens and endpoint suffixes.

netlify/edge-functions/firecrawl-proxy.j.summary: Edge function that proxies POST requests to Firecrawl's search API, returning sanitized and reshaped search results.

netlify/edge-functions/github-token-prox.summary: Edge function that returns the GITHUB_PAT environment variable as a JSON response when called via GET, for client-side use.

netlify/edge-functions/langsearch-proxy..summary: Edge function that proxies POST requests to LangSearch's web-search API, forwarding the request body and returning JSON responses.

netlify/edge-functions/openrouter-proxy..summary: Netlify edge function that proxies POST requests to OpenRouter API, handling authentication, streaming responses via SSE, and error forwarding.

netlify/inject-preview-bypass.js.summary: Build script that injects a JavaScript snippet into index.html during deploy-preview context to bypass the login gate and show the root element.

preferences.json.summary: Configuration file for the self-improving bot containing editable settings for clarification prompts, planning rules, execution style, and review strictness.

src/components/SimpleChat.js.summary: React chat component that manages messages, task lists, toasts, and pending command dispatch, integrating with workspace and provider stores.

src/components/SimpleChat/Header.js.summary: React header component displaying the self-recursive bot title and input fields for repository and branch, with responsive design for mobile.

src/components/SimpleChat/InputBar.js.summary: React input bar component with a text input and send button, supporting Enter key submission and mobile responsive layout.

src/components/SimpleChat/MessageList.js.summary: React component that renders a scrollable list of chat messages with distinct styling for user and agent messages, responsive to window width.

src/components/SimpleChat/TaskList.js.summary: React component displaying a scrollable list of tasks with status indicators (DONE, FAILED, etc.), responsive to window width.

src/components/SimpleChat/Toaster.js.summary: React component that renders a fixed-position toast notification with colored border based on type (error or success).

src/core/SelfImprover.js.summary: Main orchestrator class for self-improvement runs that handles hierarchical task decomposition, persistent memory, LLM calls, and integration with GitHub services.

src/core/WorkingMemory.js.summary: Defines WorkingMemory class that accumulates file summaries and notes during agentic runs, and builds a compact context string for LLM prompts.

src/core/agenticExecutor.js.summary: Executes a single task using a read-before-write loop where the LLM can request additional file reads before producing a final code change.

src/core/agenticPlanner.js.summary: Implements an agentic planner that explores candidate files via LLM-driven actions to formulate a plan for a coding goal.

src/core/chunkedIndexer.js.summary: Builds a keyword index for a repository by processing files in groups of 10, extracting keywords and summaries via fast LLM calls.

src/core/clarification.js.summary: Generates clarifying questions (via LLM) to enrich the user's goal before the agent starts making code changes.

src/core/coordinatedPlanner.js.summary: Creates a multi-agent plan by running parallel exploration agents per directory, then merges summaries via a coordinator agent.

src/core/fileDiscovery.js.summary: Discovers relevant files from a keyword index or filename scan, scoring them against the goal words to select top candidates.

src/core/hierarchicalPlanner.js.summary: Extends planners with the ability to decompose a complex goal into hierarchical sub-goals based on LLM analysis.

src/core/keywordIndexer.js.summary: Implements fuzzy matching of slash commands using Levenshtein distance to find the best match from a command list.

src/core/manifestManager.js.summary: Ensures a manifest.json is loaded from the repo or built from the source tree by reading JS/JSX files.

src/core/parallelExec.js.summary: Executes the task queue in parallel up to a maxConcurrency limit, skipping tasks that touch already-locked files to avoid conflicts, and using executeTaskAgentic for each task.

src/core/persistentMemory.js.summary: Manages saving and loading working memory to/from the repo as JSON files scoped by a runId, including serialize/deserialize helper functions and memory path builder.

src/core/planner.js.summary: Uses an LLM to generate a structured JSON plan (milestone title, analysis, up to 4 tasks) based on a goal and discovered file context, then initializes the task queue.

src/core/prCreator.js.summary: Creates a GitHub pull request with a title derived from the goal (truncated to 60 characters) and returns the PR URL.

src/core/reviewer.js.summary: Reviews completed tasks by loading their committed file contents from the repo and using an LLM to check if implementation matches the task description and goal.

src/core/taskQueue.js.summary: Provides functions to initialize, query, and update a task queue with status tracking (TODO, DONE, FAILED, REVIEW_PASSED) and task finder by ID.

src/main.js.summary: Bootstraps the React application by creating a root, setting up service instances (GitHub, LLM, executor, etc.), and auto-loading the GitHub token from Netlify env if not locally stored.

src/services/PreferencesService.js.summary: Loads and saves a preferences.json file from/to the repo with defaults for clarification, planning, execution, and review settings, used to inject custom instructions into agent prompts.

src/services/executorApi.js.summary: Provides a static API class that calls lint/syntax/health endpoints through a Netlify edge proxy, with fail-open behavior to allow commits if the Railway backend is unreachable.

src/services/github.js.summary: Provides static methods for GitHub API interactions including fetching file trees, loading file content (base64-decoded), and committing multiple files with a new tree.

src/services/llmProvider.js.summary: LLMProvider manages calls to language models via Netlify edge proxies, with configurable timeout (default 20s), fast model override, and support for thinking/reasoning modes on DeepSeek.

src/services/smokeTest.js.summary: SmokeTest polls a Netlify deploy-preview URL until the page renders correctly (detecting root element and no SyntaxError) within a configurable timeout.

src/stores/providerStore.js.summary: useProviderStore is a Zustand store with persistence that manages LLM provider selection, model, thinking mode, and reasoning effort preferences.

src/stores/workspaceStore.js.summary: useWorkspaceStore is a Zustand store with persistence for workspace settings including repository, branch, GitHub token, and key remember flag.

src/utils/agentSkills.js.summary: processAgentSkills parses AI replies for <skill> tags to extract update_editor blocks and read_file requests, replacing them with descriptive notes.

src/utils/contextBuilder.js.summary: ContextBuilder identifies required source files based on import relationships and builds a token-budgeted context string with full and interface-only file content.

src/utils/manifestBuilder.js.summary: ManifestBuilder constructs a dependency graph from JavaScript files by extracting ES module exports/imports and resolving relative paths.

src/utils/sandboxTest.js.summary: testCodeSandbox runs user code in a sandboxed iframe with preloaded service modules and returns whether the SelfImprover healthCheck succeeds within a timeout.

src/utils/stripComments.js.summary: stripComments removes JavaScript and CSS comments (block and line) and blank lines from code to reduce prompt token usage.
